latest_release.name: Version 2.7.0
latest_release.body:
- Auto-append `.git` suffix for GitHub/GitLab URLs missing it [[#225](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/225)]
- Support version suffix on git URL package installs [[#223](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/223)]
- Set package index repository as non-canonical to allow Packagist to resolve newer versions [[#222](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/222)]
- Fix some newly reported PHPStan issues [[#220](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/220)]
- Default package installation to @stable instead of default branch [[#219](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/219)]
- Handle additional git providers in `set_composer_auth_env_var()` [[#218](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/218)]
- Add `is-installed` subcommand [[#214](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/214)]
- Regenerate README file [[#213](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/213)]
- Add wp package get command to retrieve single package information [[#212](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/212)]
- Add --skip-update-check flag to wp package list [[#211](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/211)]
- Add optional package name arguments to `wp package update` [[#208](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/208)]
- Add --no-interaction flag to prevent Git/SSH prompts in package commands [[#206](https://github.com/wp-cli/package-command/pull/206)]
